examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (5007 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 4 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
API usage-doc coverage is low: 40.0% (128 API pages detected)
Example reliability: 0% on 943 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.

analysis.executive_summary: Fly.io documentation audit covered 943 pages with 100% crawl coverage and 89.85% overall confidence. Critical issue: 93 confirmed broken internal documentation links require immediate remediation. API reference coverage is low at 40% across 128 detected API pages. Example code reliability shows 0% detection, indicating a likely technical limitation with JavaScript-rendered content. SEO/metadata issues affect 10.26% of pages, and only 57.26% of pages display last-updated timestamps.
strengths: High overall audit confidence at 89.85% with strong crawl confidence at 95%
No repository navigation broken links (repo_broken_links_count: 0), all issues are user-facing
128 API pages successfully detected without detection limitations flagged
Comprehensive site topology mapped in single-product mode with 1295 URLs examined
risks: 93 confirmed broken internal documentation links directly impact user navigation and trust
API reference coverage at 40% leaves 60% of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
0% example reliability score suggests code samples may not be validated or are undetectable
10.26% SEO/GEO issue rate (97+ pages) may harm discoverability and search rankings
42.74% of pages lack last-updated metadata, undermining content trustworthiness
4 links unverified due to auth/rate-limit/server blocks, creating blind spots in link health
102 trap URLs skipped during crawl may hide additional documentation quality issues

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 93 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Increase API reference coverage from 40% to minimum 80% by documenting missing endpoints and improving interlinking
Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages (currently 57.26% coverage)
Resolve SEO/metadata issues affecting 10.26% of pages (titles, descriptions, headings)
Investigate and fix example code detection (0% reliability likely due to JS rendering or detection gap)

limitations: Example reliability at 0% indicates detection limitation with JavaScript-rendered code blocks; actual code quality cannot be assessed
4 links remain unverified due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks; true link health unknown
External audit cannot validate accuracy of technical content, only structural and navigational integrity
102 trap URLs were excluded from crawl; potential documentation issues in those paths are not assessed
API coverage measurement depends on detection heuristics; actual API completeness requires manual verification against API specification
